Index.meta_description: myLearning delivers bite-sized microlearning courses your team can complete anywhere, on any device — built for busy, distributed teams who learn on the go.

Hero.title: The perfect <important>microlearning platform</important> to train and upskill your team, anywhere.
Hero.description: Deliver bite-sized, mobile-first training your team can complete in minutes — on the shop floor, on the road, or between meetings.

Features.section_title: Everything You Need to Train Your Team on the Go
Features.section_description: Bite-sized lessons, progress tracking, and mobile-first delivery — everything your team needs to build skills without leaving the field.
Features.feature_description: Bite-sized lessons, progress tracking, and mobile-first delivery — everything your team needs to build skills without leaving the field.

Pricing.section_title: Simple Plans That Grow With Your Team
Pricing.section_description: Choose the plan that fits your team's training needs, from solo upskilling to company-wide rollouts.

FAQ.answer1: A mobile-first training platform built for teams that don't sit at a desk all day. Instead of long courses, your team gets short, focused lessons — often just a few minutes — that fit between shifts, calls, or stops on the road.
FAQ.question2: Do employees need to download an app?
FAQ.answer2: No. Lessons open directly from a link — in a text message, an email, or wherever you share it. No app store, no install, no separate password to remember.
FAQ.answer3: Instead of one long training session, content is broken into short, focused pieces — a single skill or scenario at a time. Learners get more of it done because each piece takes minutes, not hours.
FAQ.question4: How is this different from a traditional LMS?
FAQ.answer4: Most LMS platforms were built for desktop, for long courses, and for compliance checkboxes. myLearning is built mobile-first from the ground up, and tracks what someone actually did during a lesson — which choices they made, not just whether they clicked "complete."
FAQ.question5: Can I see how my team is progressing?
FAQ.answer5: Yes. Admins get a dashboard showing who's completed what, team-wide progress, and — because we track real interactions, not just pass/fail — a clearer picture of where your team is actually strong or still learning.
FAQ.question6: How do I get my team started?
FAQ.answer6: Invite your team by email, they open their first lesson on their phone, and you're live — typically in minutes, not a multi-week rollout.

CTA.title: Ready to level up your team?
CTA.description: Roll out mobile-first microlearning to your whole team in minutes — no LMS required.
